textByHashes.10a5fe410344d198f77cdacf76b56b7905d4f885: Are you here to make juniper charcoal?
textByHashes.c8773f66178ca17cfd750b05c137ba5a5a6f0225: They use it in the blast mine, out near Lovakengj. It's powerful stuff, more volatile than the regular charcoal you get elsewhere.
textByHashes.a75b54b966a5f8a6749878ddc0dc0b2ca9e037a5: To make juniper charcoal, put some juniper logs in my furnaces, then set them alight. I'll keep an eye on it for a fee of 600 coins.
textByHashes.1783a85fd51be8013d30bf7d2bdcfdaec36292ad: Juniper charcoal is my trade, always has been, ever since my mum taught me. She's retired now, and returned to Lovakengj - that's where we're from.
textByHashes.e93873aaf42af943c33d7f85364d8118e8e2c973: I just live out here in the Hosidius farmlands because it's handy for the juniper trees.
textByHashes.d6084e2be135f6e9f0bc95f132ac826b04421073: For a small fee, I watch the charcoal furnace so that you can make charcoal here. Also, I do a great back- rub, if you're ever in the mood.
textByHashes.36d5067b196c185ffe4a1554c0ed57c63dc6d894: Yup, but I'll keep it for someone who needs it.
textByHashes.1f5e4225cc4de90f9893889ca21760804bf7f036: Yup, but you can't hold it.
